member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.Internal.ModbusConnection
member.summary: TCP connection helpers with timeout and cancellation support.

member.name: M:Frends.ModbusTcp.Internal.ModbusConnection.ConnectAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to a Modbus TCP slave with an independent connect timeout. Throws TimeoutException if the timeout expires before the connection is established. Throws SocketException if the connection is refused or the host is unreachable.

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.Internal.ModbusDecoder
member.summary: Pure stateless decoder: ushort[] → typed values with endianness and scale/offset.

member.name: M:Frends.ModbusTcp.Internal.ModbusDecoder.TranslateAddress(System.UInt16,Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.AddressingMode)
member.summary: Translates a user-supplied StartAddress to the wire address per AddressingMode.

member.name: M:Frends.ModbusTcp.Internal.ModbusDecoder.ComputeRegisterCount(Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusValueType,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Returns the number of 16-bit registers needed on the wire for the given value type and count. For AsciiString, numberOfValues IS the register count (spec: NumberOfValues interpreted as registers).

member.name: M:Frends.ModbusTcp.Internal.ModbusDecoder.Decode(System.UInt16[],Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusValueType,Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ByteOrder,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Decodes a ushort[] register array into a typed value array (or string), applying scale and offset.

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.AddressingMode
member.summary: Addressing convention used when interpreting the StartAddress field.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.AddressingMode.ZeroBased
member.summary: Addresses are sent on the wire as-is. Matches Modbus PDU spec and most modern device manuals.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.AddressingMode.ModiconOneBased
member.summary: Legacy Modicon 1-based addressing: address 40001 maps to holding register 0 on the wire. Subtracts 1 and strips leading 4xxxx/3xxxx/1xxxx range prefix if present. Use when your device manual shows addresses like "40001" or "30001".

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ByteOrder
member.summary: Byte and word order for multi-register values (Int32, UInt32, Float32, Float64). Letters A-D denote bytes from most-significant (A) to least-significant (D) of the decoded value.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ByteOrder.BigEndian
member.summary: ABCD: high word first, high byte first. Modbus spec default. Most PLCs and modern devices.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ByteOrder.LittleEndian
member.summary: DCBA: low word first, low byte first. Full little-endian byte order.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ByteOrder.BigEndianByteSwap
member.summary: BADC: high word first, bytes swapped within each 16-bit word.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ByteOrder.LittleEndianWordSwap
member.summary: CDAB: low word first, high byte first within each 16-bit word. Modicon/Schneider convention; also common on many energy meters (WattNode, etc.).

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Diagnostics
member.summary: Timing and connection metrics for the read operation. Always populated, including on failure.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Diagnostics.ConnectTimeMs
member.summary: Time spent establishing the TCP connection, in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Diagnostics.ReadTimeMs
member.summary: Time spent waiting for the Modbus response after the connection was established, in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Diagnostics.TotalTimeMs
member.summary: Total wall-clock time for the operation, in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Diagnostics.AttemptCount
member.summary: Number of read attempts made. Always 1 in v1.0 — placeholder for v1.1 retry support.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Diagnostics.Host
member.summary: Hostname or IP address used for the connection.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Diagnostics.Port
member.summary: TCP port used for the connection.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Diagnostics.UnitId
member.summary: Modbus unit ID sent in the request.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Diagnostics.WireStartAddress
member.summary: Start address as sent on the wire, after AddressingMode translation.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Diagnostics.WireRegisterCount
member.summary: Number of registers requested on the wire. For multi-word types, this is greater than NumberOfValues.

member.name: M:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Diagnostics.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.String,System.Int32,System.Byte,System.UInt16,System.UInt16,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new Diagnostics instance.

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorCategory
member.summary: High-level error category for routing in Process Exclusive Decision shapes.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorCategory.None
member.summary: No error.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorCategory.Timeout
member.summary: TCP connect or read timed out. Likely transient.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorCategory.ConnectionRefused
member.summary: Connection was actively refused by the target host. Often transient.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorCategory.HostUnreachable
member.summary: Target host is unreachable at the network level. Often transient.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorCategory.Cancelled
member.summary: Operation was cancelled via CancellationToken.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorCategory.ModbusException
member.summary: Modbus slave returned an exception response (exception codes 1–11).

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorCategory.DecodingError
member.summary: Wire read succeeded but type decoding failed (e.g. invalid bytes for AsciiString).

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorCategory.InvalidInput
member.summary: Invalid input parameters (bad address, count out of range, etc.). Not retryable.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorCategory.Unexpected
member.summary: Unexpected error not covered by other categories.

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorDetail
member.summary: Structured error information returned when Success is false.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorDetail.Category
member.summary: High-level error category. Use this for Process routing logic.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorDetail.IsTransient
member.summary: True if retrying the same request later is likely to succeed. True for: Timeout, ConnectionRefused, HostUnreachable, SlaveDeviceBusy (code 6), GatewayPathUnavailable (code 10), GatewayTargetDeviceFailedToRespond (code 11). False for: IllegalFunction (1), IllegalDataAddress (2), IllegalDataValue (3), DecodingError, InvalidInput, and others.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorDetail.ModbusExceptionCode
member.summary: Modbus exception code if the slave returned one (1–11 per spec), else null.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorDetail.SocketErrorCode
member.summary: Socket error code string if the failure was at TCP level, else null.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorDetail.Message
member.summary: Human-readable summary for logs. Do not route Process logic on this string — use Category instead.

member.name: M:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorDetail.#ctor(Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorCategory,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new ErrorDetail.

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Input
member.summary: Parameters for a single Modbus TCP read operation.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Input.Host
member.summary: IP address or hostname of the Modbus TCP slave device.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Input.Port
member.summary: TCP port of the Modbus TCP slave. Standard Modbus port is 502.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Input.UnitId
member.summary: Modbus unit ID (slave address). Most devices use 1. Modbus/TCP-to-RTU gateways often use 247 or 255.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Input.DataType
member.summary: Modbus data type to read. Determines which function code is used: Coils (FC01), DiscreteInputs (FC02), HoldingRegisters (FC03), InputRegisters (FC04).

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Input.StartAddress
member.summary: Starting register address. For zero-based addressing (default) this is the raw PDU address. For Modicon one-based addressing, use the address as shown in your device manual (e.g. 40001).

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Input.NumberOfValues
member.summary: Number of typed values to read. The Task automatically converts this to the correct register count: Float32 = 2 registers each, Float64 = 4 registers each, others = 1 register each. For AsciiString, this is the number of registers (2 ASCII characters per register).

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Input.ValueType
member.summary: How to interpret the raw 16-bit register words. Ignored for Coils and DiscreteInputs (those always return bool[]). Raw returns ushort[] unchanged.

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusDataType
member.summary: Modbus data type (function code selection).

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusDataType.Coils
member.summary: Coil outputs (FC01). Single-bit, read-write. Returns bool[].

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusDataType.DiscreteInputs
member.summary: Discrete inputs (FC02). Single-bit, read-only. Returns bool[].

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusDataType.HoldingRegisters
member.summary: Holding registers (FC03). 16-bit, read-write. Most common.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusDataType.InputRegisters
member.summary: Input registers (FC04). 16-bit, read-only.

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusValueType
member.summary: How to interpret the raw 16-bit register words returned from the device.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusValueType.Raw
member.summary: Raw 16-bit values. Returns ushort[] for register types, bool[] for coil types. Use when you need the raw wire data (e.g. to pass through to a downstream system unchanged).

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusValueType.Int16
member.summary: Signed 16-bit integer. One register per value.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusValueType.UInt16
member.summary: Unsigned 16-bit integer. One register per value.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusValueType.Int32
member.summary: Signed 32-bit integer. Two registers per value. Byte/word order from Options.ByteOrder.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusValueType.UInt32
member.summary: Unsigned 32-bit integer. Two registers per value. Byte/word order from Options.ByteOrder.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusValueType.Float32
member.summary: IEEE-754 single-precision float. Two registers per value. Byte/word order from Options.ByteOrder.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusValueType.Float64
member.summary: IEEE-754 double-precision float. Four registers per value. Byte/word order from Options.ByteOrder.

member.name: F:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ModbusValueType.AsciiString
member.summary: ASCII string. NumberOfValues is interpreted as number of registers (2 chars each); returns a single string with null-padding trimmed.

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Options
member.summary: Behavioral options for the Modbus TCP read operation.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Options.ByteOrder
member.summary: Byte and word order for multi-register values (Int32, UInt32, Float32, Float64). Ignored for Raw, Int16, UInt16, AsciiString, and coil reads. Default is BigEndian (high word first, high byte first) — Modbus spec default. Use LittleEndianWordSwap for Modicon/Schneider-style "low word first". Check your device manual; mismatch here is the #1 cause of wrong readings.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Options.AddressingMode
member.summary: Addressing convention. ZeroBased = the address is sent on the wire as-is (matches Modbus PDU spec). ModiconOneBased = subtract 1 from the address before sending, and strip leading 4xxxx/3xxxx/1xxxx prefix if present. Use ModiconOneBased when your device manual shows addresses like "40001".

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Options.Scale
member.summary: Linear scale factor applied to decoded numeric values: output = (raw * Scale) + Offset. Example: meter returns 2304 for 230.4 V → use Scale = 0.1. Applied only to numeric ValueTypes; never to Raw, AsciiString, or coil reads.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Options.Offset
member.summary: Offset added after Scale: output = (raw * Scale) + Offset. See Scale.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Options.ConnectTimeoutMs
member.summary: TCP socket connect timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Options.ReadTimeoutMs
member.summary: Per-read timeout in milliseconds. Does not cover connect time; see ConnectTimeoutMs.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Options.ThrowOnFailure
member.summary: If true, the Task throws an exception instead of returning a Result with Success=false. Default false. Frends convention: prefer structured Results so Processes can route with Exclusive Decision shapes rather than error handlers.

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Result
member.summary: Result of a Modbus TCP read operation.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Result.Success
member.summary: True if the read completed without error and decoding succeeded.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Result.Data
member.summary: Decoded data. Shape depends on Input.DataType and Input.ValueType: Coils / DiscreteInputs → bool[] Registers + Raw → ushort[] Registers + Int16 → short[] (or double[] if Scale/Offset applied) Registers + UInt16 → ushort[] (or double[] if Scale/Offset applied) Registers + Int32 / UInt32 → int[] or uint[] (or double[] if Scale/Offset applied) Registers + Float32 → float[] (or double[] if Scale/Offset applied) Registers + Float64 → double[] Registers + AsciiString → string Null when Success is false.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Result.FirstValue
member.summary: Convenience accessor: Data cast and first element returned when Data is a non-empty array, or Data itself when Data is a string. Null when Success is false or Data is empty. Useful for the common single-value read case.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Result.RawRegisters
member.summary: Raw 16-bit register values as received from the wire, before typing and scaling. Populated for all register reads regardless of ValueType, to aid debugging. Null for Coil and DiscreteInput reads.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Result.Error
member.summary: Structured error information when Success is false; null when Success is true.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Result.Diagnostics
member.summary: Timing and connection metrics. Always populated, including on failure.

member.name: M:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Result.#ctor(System.Object,System.UInt16[],Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Diagnostics)
member.summary: Initializes a successful Result.

member.name: M:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Result.#ctor(Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorDetail,Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Diagnostics)
member.summary: Initializes a failed Result.

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Read
member.summary: Frends Task for reading typed, scaled values from Modbus TCP slave devices.

member.name: M:Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Read.ReadData(Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Input,Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Options,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads one or more values from a Modbus TCP slave device and returns typed, endianness-corrected, scale-adjusted output. Supports coils, discrete inputs, holding registers, and input registers. Returns a structured Result — check Result.Success before using Result.Data.
member.param: Timeout, byte order, scale, and error-handling options.
Propagated from the Frends Agent; propagates correctly on Process abort.
member.returns: Result containing typed data, raw registers for debugging, error details, and timing diagnostics.

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchInput
member.summary: Input for a batched Modbus TCP read operation over a single TCP connection.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchInput.Host
member.summary: IP address or hostname of the Modbus TCP slave device.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchInput.Port
member.summary: TCP port of the Modbus TCP slave. Standard Modbus port is 502.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchInput.UnitId
member.summary: Modbus unit ID (slave address). Most devices use 1.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchInput.Items
member.summary: List of register reads to execute over the single TCP connection. IMPORTANT: A Modbus exception on one item does not abort the batch — only socket-level failures do. Each item reports its own success/error in BatchResult.Items.

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchReadItem
member.summary: Specification for a single read within a batch operation.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchReadItem.Name
member.summary: Name used as the dictionary key in BatchResult.Items. Must be unique within the batch.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchReadItem.DataType
member.summary: Modbus data type to read for this item.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchReadItem.StartAddress
member.summary: Starting register address for this item.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchReadItem.NumberOfValues
member.summary: Number of typed values to read for this item.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchReadItem.ValueType
member.summary: How to interpret the raw register words for this item.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchReadItem.Scale
member.summary: Scale factor for this item: output = (raw * Scale) + Offset.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchReadItem.Offset
member.summary: Offset for this item: output = (raw * Scale) + Offset.

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.ReadOutcome
member.summary: Result of a single read item within a batch operation.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.ReadOutcome.Success
member.summary: True if this individual item was read and decoded successfully.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.ReadOutcome.Data
member.summary: Decoded data for this item. Shape depends on DataType and ValueType. Null on failure.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.ReadOutcome.FirstValue
member.summary: First element of Data, or Data itself for strings. Null on failure or empty data.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.ReadOutcome.RawRegisters
member.summary: Raw 16-bit register values from the wire before typing/scaling. Null for coil reads or on failure.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.ReadOutcome.Error
member.summary: Error details when Success is false; null when Success is true.

member.name: M:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.ReadOutcome.#ctor(System.Object,System.UInt16[])
member.summary: Initializes a successful ReadOutcome.

member.name: M:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.ReadOutcome.#ctor(Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorDetail)
member.summary: Initializes a failed ReadOutcome.

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchResult
member.summary: Result of a batched Modbus TCP read operation.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchResult.Success
member.summary: True unless a socket-level failure aborted the entire batch. Individual item Modbus exceptions do NOT set this to false — check each item in Items.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchResult.Items
member.summary: Per-item results keyed by BatchReadItem.Name. Contains outcomes for all items that were attempted before any socket-level failure.

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchResult.Diagnostics
member.summary: Batch-level diagnostics (connect time, total time, etc.).

member.name: P:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchResult.Error
member.summary: Set only when a socket-level failure aborted the batch early. Null on full success or per-item failures.

member.name: M:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchResult.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.ReadOutcome},Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Diagnostics)
member.summary: Initializes a successful (or partially-failed) BatchResult.

member.name: M:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchResult.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.ReadOutcome},Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Diagnostics,Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.ErrorDetail)
member.summary: Initializes a BatchResult aborted by a socket-level failure.

member.name: T:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.ReadBatch
member.summary: Frends Task for reading multiple register blocks from a Modbus TCP slave over a single TCP connection.

member.name: M:Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.ReadBatch.ReadBatchData(Frends.ModbusTcp.ReadBatch.Definitions.BatchInput,Frends.ModbusTcp.Read.Definitions.Options,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens one TCP connection and executes all reads in Input.Items sequentially, then closes. A Modbus exception on one item fails that item but does not abort the batch. A socket-level failure aborts the entire batch and sets BatchResult.Success = false.
member.param: Connection info and list of register reads to perform.
Timeout, byte order, and error-handling options (shared across all items).
member.returns: BatchResult with per-item outcomes and batch-level diagnostics.
